accurate.why: Dollar figures cited ($3.01B construction, $5.714B O&M, $1.773B Bureau of Reclamation, $20.338B weapons, $8.39B science, $955.3M NRC) all match the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; specific provisions described match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 appropriations for water resources, energy research, and national security programs.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the Natural Gas Act amendment granting FERC exclusive authority over LNG facilities, and Calfed authorization extensions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes prohibitions on firearms regulations, Justice40, Strategic Petroleum Reserve sales to CCP-entities, and COVID mandates.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date discussion needed for appropriations bills; FY2025 period is implied.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers Corps of Engineers, Interior, DOE, and independent agencies with key figures.

concise.why: Reasonably concise while covering the key provisions of a complex bill.

correct_entities.why: Army Corps, Bureau of Reclamation, DOE, FERC, NRC all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All cited figures match the bill text.
